name: Cranberry-Orange Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Sour milk (1/2 tbsp lemon juice mixed with fluid milk and a small amount of skim milk powder)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F and spray at least 12 muffin cups lined with paper baking cups.
2. Combine dry ingredients in a bowl: cranberry sauce, flour, sugar (or less for diabetic), cinnamon, baking powder, and baking soda.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, sour milk mixture, vegetable oil, and orange rind until just combined.
4. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until they are just combined.
5. Bake for about 20 minutes or until lightly browned and firm to the touch. Adjust baking time if using smaller muffin cups.
6. Variations: Substitute cranberries with mashed banana, dates/raisins, applesauce, or coarsely chopped apple. Zucchini can also be added.
7. For a diabetic meal plan, reduce sugar to 1/4 cup or 1 tsp per serving (American Diabetes Association recommendation).
